ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether inserted callouts should have an explicit or implicit title by default. E.g. `> [!quote] Quote` vs `> [!quote]`.
ast.target: 插入的标注默认应具有显式还是隐式标题。例如 `> [!quote] Quote` 与 `> [!quote]`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to select, or where to place the cursor, after running a command. Selecting up to the header (or full text) can help with switching callout types quickly (by running remove/wrap back to back). But the other modes have their own merits as well. Experiment around to see what you prefer!
ast.target: 运行命令后，选择内容或光标放置的位置。选择到标题（或全文）有助于快速切换标注类型（通过连续运行移除/包裹命令）。但其他模式也各有优势。请自行尝试，看看您更喜欢哪种！

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动选择 / 自动定位光标
